# THE JEWEL OF MIAMI

Masterfully crafted luxury residences above Miami Worldcenter

[Discover](https://www.thejem.com/residences)

## Sky Villas:  Designed by Fendi Casa

[Discover](https://www.thejem.com/skyvillas)

## Miami Worldcenter:  The Future of Miami

[Discover the Neighborhood](https://www.thejem.com/neighborhood)

## The Skyline Resort

[Discover Amenities](https://www.thejem.com/amenities)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/666b1867f34d1ad19dab0d13/6954846dbcf7b9482e35ba3a_a-remarkable-oasis.jpg)

"A remarkable oasis within the Miami Worldcenter—JEM embodies Naftali Group's commitment to delivering iconic residential experiences through architecture, design, precise craftsmanship, and thoughtfully-curated lifestyle."

Miki Naftali

Chairman and CEO,

Naftali Group

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/666b1867f34d1ad19dab0d13/6954846bb55402acf052bd5c_architectural-masterpiece.jpg)

## Architectural   Masterpiece

A once-in-a-generation address

Conceived as a bold, skyline-defining architectural statement, JEM offers a singular living experience—where the Naftali Group carefully designs and impeccably executes every detail.

[Discover the Building](https://www.thejem.com/building)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/666b1867f34d1ad19dab0d13/69548474750bd28f0a835d52_masterfully-crafted.jpg)

## Masterfully   Crafted

Indoor-and-outdoor living

Spanning floors 43 to 67, JEM Private Residences offer true indoor-and-outdoor lifestyle with soaring ceiling heights, full-height glass, and expansive terraces framing breathtaking panoramic views of the city, Biscayne Bay, and the Atlantic.

[Discover the Residences](https://www.thejem.com/residences)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/666b1867f34d1ad19dab0d13/6954847780cf0144b2674c73_sky-villas.jpg)

## SKY VILLAS:  INTERIORS BY  FENDI CASA

THE HIGHEST FORM OF CRAFTSMANSHIP

Crowning the sculptural JEM tower, the exclusive collection of breathtaking Sky Villas is a culmination of a visionary collaboration with Fendi Casa.

[Discover Sky Villas](https://www.thejem.com/skyvillas)

![Punching bag on a rooftop terrace overlooking Miami cityscape in the background](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/666b1867f34d1ad19dab0d13/667099a42c371616ee3de76d_04.jpg)

[play](https://www.thejem.com/#)

## MIAMI WORLDCENTER

## MIAMI’S NEW CENTER OF GRAVITY

The recently completed 27-acre cultural enclave, Miami Worldcenter, combines the city's greatest treasures into one compelling destination. With JEM as its centerpiece, this vibrant neighborhood is a place to experience contemporary art museums and galleries, cultural and entertainment venues, global flavors at the most buzzed-about restaurants, stylish retail, and the world-famous waterfront.

[DISCOVER THE NEIGHBORHOOD](https://www.thejem.com/neighborhood)

now under construction

## What's special

NOW UNDER CONSTRUCTION. Developed by Naftali Group, JEM Private Residences is the crown jewel of Downtown Miami, rising within the heart of Miami Worldcenter. The 67-story tower will soar over 700 feet, establishing a striking architectural presence in the city skyline. Offering a range of layouts from studios to four-bedroom homes, every residence begins on the 43rd floor and above, ensuring sweeping, unobstructed views of Downtown Miami. Perched atop the 50th floor, JEM's expansive amenity collection includes a 60-foot outdoor pool, an indoor Sky Lounge, a state-of-the-art fitness center, boxing arena, yoga patio, spa suite with steam, salt, and sauna rooms, as well as co-working areas and a spirits tasting room designed for elevated social experiences. Crowning the tower, JEM's two exclusive Sky Villas represent a visionary collaboration with FENDI Casa. Each residence features four bedrooms and four-and-a-half bathrooms, embodying a new standard of luxury living high above the city.

Show more
